evidence.snippet: Wilhelm Lanzky - Otto ( January 30 , 1909 – April 13 , 1991 ) was a Danish - born horn player . He is credited with inspiring a generation of Scandinavian horn players . He was educated in Copenhagen as a pianist , organist and horn player . During his life he was principal horn in the Danish Nation
